Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mazen Salfiti, Esq., 415-407-1481 for defendant and moving party Beehive Cafe
Lawrence James Less, Esq. of Less & Weaver, 415-398-9800 for plaintiff and opposing party Kam Lai Property and Investment

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT THE BEEHIVE CAFE, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Breach of lease properly alleged as to property taxes. Ten days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 (301/AJR)
